questions.scenario: The team owns the full `/etc/nginx/nginx.conf` file and it must include `{{ orders_api_port }}` from variables. Which module is the best fit?

options.text: `ansible.builtin.template`, because the whole file is rendered from a source template and variables.
`ansible.builtin.lineinfile`, because every config file should be built one line at a time.
`ansible.builtin.file`, because it can render Jinja expressions.
`ansible.builtin.copy`, because static copy always substitutes variables.

questions.explanation: Use `template` when the whole file is reviewable and needs variable substitution.
